tagline: Yesterday's good news, bright and early.

stories.headline: Lost Letter From Grandmother Found Online, Addressed to Granddaughter
stories.summary: A woman scrolling a D.C. blog recognized her grandmother's handwriting on a lost letter—addressed to her.

stories.headline: 18-Year-Old Dishwasher Buys the Restaurant With Her College Savings
stories.summary: Samantha Frye invested her future in the place that believed in her, becoming owner of Rosalie's restaurant.

stories.headline: Target Employee's 'You Can't Leave' Saved a Woman's Life
stories.summary: Security stopped a shopper from leaving self-checkout—a small intervention that turned out to be lifesaving.

stories.headline: Sea Turtle Survives Dramatic Boat Strike, Makes Remarkable Recovery
stories.summary: Dark-Blue Yellow, a sea turtle struck by a boat, is recovering at a rehabilitation center after the most severe injury rescuers had ever seen.

stories.headline: Coyote Pup Rescued From Cactus After Hundreds of Spikes
stories.summary: Rescuers freed a 3-pound coyote pup trapped in a cactus, removing barbs and restoring him to the wild.

stories.headline: Father and Son Break Three World Records Cycling 18,000 Miles Around the Globe
stories.summary: George and Josh Kohler cycled around the world in 14 months, setting three world records and proving what determination can do.

stories.headline: Service Dog Fails Every Training Test—And Everyone Loves Him For It
stories.summary: A spirited dog didn't become a service dog, but found his true purpose elsewhere and won hearts in the process.

stories.headline: Flight Attendant Finds Incredible Blessing Inside a Sealed Barf Bag
stories.summary: Passengers left a generous gift in an unexpected place—a moment of kindness that blessed a crew member in need.

stories.headline: French Polynesia Protects Ocean Area Twice the Size of Arizona
stories.summary: 200,000 square miles of biodiverse ocean will be fully protected, safeguarding thriving marine life for generations.

stories.headline: New Solar Method Turns Ocean Water Into Drinking Water and Lithium
stories.summary: An energy-efficient desalination system creates fresh water without chemicals and transforms leftover salts into valuable materials.

stories.headline: Metal Detector Enthusiast Unearths Stunning 16th-Century Diamond Ring
stories.summary: After a long day in an English field, Stuart Jones discovered a once-in-a-lifetime treasure: an eight-diamond ring from the 1500s.
